message: Hello? Is this the entrance to the high school?
Yes, it is! Are you new here?
I am. My name is Alex. I'm just starting high school and I'm a bit lost. Can you help me find my way? I just need to find the entrance to the school.
Nice to meet you, Alex. I'm %player%. You can enter through that door over there. I can show you.
Thank you, %player%! Can you show me the way?

actions.title: Show Alex the way into the high school
actions.description: You can click or select doors to move between rooms.
